title: Bare Bones Reforged Axes
description: Small tweaks to the axes textures, in the style of Bare Bones
body:
# Reforged Axes
This resource pack subtly alters the **axe textures**, giving them a more **combat-ready** appearance. It's perfectly suited for **vanilla gameplay**. It does not require OptiFine or any other dependencies to function, **in the style of Bare Bones**

## **![Modified textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/201f1810d05e15c05f1fc59f6113fd2d3fe4d728.png)**
